subcodes.first_line: This is a Book which the Wronged One hath revealed unto them that have believed in God and His signs and His evidences, and in that which He hath sent down in His Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن آمن بالله و آیاته و بیناته و ما انزله فی کتابه و بما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @wisdom [hikmat]
